Incident-Response-Plan-Basics_508c.pdf.description: • Train the staff . All staff need to understand their role in maintaining and improving the security of the organization. That includes knowing how to report suspicious events. Be gracious when people report false alarms. Reward people who come forward to report suspicious events as part of your commitment to a culture of security. • Review your plan with an attorney .
